note: Customers withdrew nearly 198 million dollars after June 12 before the halt.
Withdrawals trading and deposits were suspended together.
Customer recovery depended on restructuring and moratorium protection.
A Nexo term sheet created rescue optionality but not immediate liquidity.
Later rejection of the Nexo proposal showed acquisition recovery remained uncertain.
Vauld cited TerraUSD contagion as a factor behind increased withdrawal requests.
